query:
SELECT 
  id,
  name,
  email,
  role,
  loginMethod,
  createdAt,
  lastSignedIn,
  onboardingStep,
  onboardingCompletedAt,
  currentTool,
  currentToolOther,
  painPoints,
  painPointsOther,
  successDefinition,
  willingnessToPay,
  additionalNotes
FROM users
WHERE createdAt >= '2026-03-21 22:00:00'
  AND createdAt <= '2026-03-22 02:00:00'
ORDER BY createdAt ASC;
command:

SELECT 
  id,
  name,
  email,
  role,
  loginMethod,
  createdAt,
  lastSignedIn,
  onboardingStep,
  onboardingCompletedAt,
  currentTool,
  currentToolOther,
  painPoints,
  painPointsOther,
  successDefinition,
  willingnessToPay,
  additionalNotes
FROM users
WHERE createdAt >= '2026-03-21 22:00:00'
  AND createdAt <= '2026-03-22 02:00:00'
